/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libvelocity_command_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libvelocity_command_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/velocity_command_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/velocity_command_msgs/msg/simple_velocity_command__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ros/docker_pronto_ws/build/velocity_command_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libvelocity_command_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
